rule_metadata.author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Query Tor Onion Address - DNS Client

rules.rule_text:
title: Query Tor Onion Address - DNS Client
id: 8384bd26-bde6-4da9-8e5d-4174a7a47ca2
related:
- id: b55ca2a3-7cff-4dda-8bdd-c7bfa63bf544
  type: similar
- id: a8322756-015c-42e7-afb1-436e85ed3ff5
  type: similar
status: test
description: Detects DNS resolution of an .onion address related to Tor routing networks
references:
- https://www.logpoint.com/en/blog/detecting-tor-use-with-logpoint/
- https://github.com/Azure/Azure-Sentinel/blob/f99542b94afe0ad2f19a82cc08262e7ac8e1428e/Detections/ASimDNS/imDNS_TorProxies.yaml
author: Nasreddine Bencherchali (Nextron Systems)
date: 2022-02-20
modified: 2025-09-12
tags:
- attack.command-and-control
- attack.t1090.003
logsource:
  product: windows
  service: dns-client
  definition: 'Requirements: Microsoft-Windows-DNS Client Events/Operational Event
    Log must be enabled/collected in order to receive the events.'
detection:
  selection:
    EventID: 3008
    QueryName|endswith:
    - .hiddenservice.net
    - .onion.ca
    - .onion.cab
    - .onion.casa
    - .onion.city
    - .onion.direct
    - .onion.dog
    - .onion.glass
    - .onion.gq
    - .onion.guide
    - .onion.in.net
    - .onion.ink
    - .onion.it
    - .onion.link
    - .onion.lt
    - .onion.lu
    - .onion.ly
    - .onion.mn
    - .onion.network
    - .onion.nu
    - .onion.pet
    - .onion.plus
    - .onion.pt
    - .onion.pw
    - .onion.rip
    - .onion.sh
    - .onion.si
    - .onion.to
    - .onion.top
    - .onion.ws
    - .onion
    - .s1.tor-gateways.de
    - .s2.tor-gateways.de
    - .s3.tor-gateways.de
    - .s4.tor-gateways.de
    - .s5.tor-gateways.de
    - .t2w.pw
    - .tor2web.ae.org
    - .tor2web.blutmagie.de
    - .tor2web.com
    - .tor2web.fi
    - .tor2web.io
    - .tor2web.org
    - .tor2web.xyz
    - .torlink.co
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: high
